use_cases: Animated hero section background with flowing gradient mesh effects for landing pages
Full-screen visual backdrop for marketing websites and product showcases
Dynamic gradient backgrounds for presentations and digital media content
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered animated gradient mesh component using OGL that renders organic, flowing gradient effects with configurable color blending, swirl distortion, water wave animations, and rotation. Features real-time shader-based rendering with parameters for speed, scale, rotation, and grain effects. Ideal for creating visually striking animated backgrounds in hero sections or as standalone visual elements for modern web applications.
